steps.title: Identify the subject and number
steps.content: The subject of the sentence with the blank is “The sculpture.” Because it refers to one sculpture, the subject is singular.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match its subject's number, and “stands” is the singular form needed. The other choices are plural verb phrases that do not agree with the singular subject sculpture.
That is the correct answer.
